summary: Crypto markets show mild bullish consolidation around $78K for Bitcoin with resistance at $78,500, amid expectations of sustained highs into May but potential selloff risks from Fed policy shifts. Commodities like gold exhibit strength at high levels, while broader markets anticipate modest growth with easing rates. Sentiment remains cautiously optimistic despite macro uncertainties.
